title: astracantha parnassi subsp. cyllenea
intro: Astracantha parnassi subsp. cyllenea, also known as a plant species within the Astragalus genus, is a type of legume that is native to the mountainous regions of Greece. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astracantha parnassi subsp. cyllenea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
